name: prometheus-linkedin
description: LinkedIn Campaign Analyzer with AI-powered batching and ROI tracking

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.render:build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
